name: Midnight Mint Pie
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2 Blend cookie crumbs with butter and press into bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan.
3 Bake 5 to 7 minutes and cool thoroughly.
4 Beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5 Add chocolate, eggs, and peppermint extract, beating until well combined.
6 Mound filling into the baked pie shell.
7 Freeze until firm.
